doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future date), cites a nonexistent EDPB guidance format, and contradicts core GDPR principles that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from current time), uses a non-existent EDPB guidance number format, and proposes a legal position fundamentally inconsistent with established GDPR principles that pseudonymized data remains personal data regardless of who holds the key.

CONFIDENCE: 95
